title: Im looking for hentai involving Evas and just Evas
display_title: Im looking for hentai involving Evas and just Evas
wikitext:
[]: I'm looking for hentai involving Evas... and just Evas. Post by Zenoseiya » Fri Jan 22, 2010 10:02 pm No, you did not read that wrong. I actually find Evangelions to be sexually attractive. I'm also a Giger fan, if that explains anything. If anyone can point me to any doujins or comics or something involving Evangelions, I would be very appreciative.

[]: Post by NemZ » Fri Jan 22, 2010 10:04 pm talk to Reichu

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 22, 2010 10:15 pm This is the closest you will get: http://www.avians.net/rkc/fan/gallery-eva.html Also: http://www.evacommentary.org/omake/xhe.html Enjoy. Actually... don't.... that'd be gross.

[]: Post by Defectron » Fri Jan 22, 2010 10:17 pm Hurray! There's someone on the forums who likes stranger things then I do! Tell me, do you sometimes fantasize about what it would be like to be an eva and have sex with other evas? I mean I don't do that, but I would totally see where your coming from if you do.

[]: Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jan 22, 2010 11:42 pm I'm reasonably sure this topic needs to be locked. I think.
